sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36119" key="e)nsugkataze/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνσυγκαταζέω</orth>, <sense id="n36119.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make to boil together,</tr_> Mnesith. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:4:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.4.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
